description: After 2 pre-stuffed tool rounds, does the model still emit a tool_call for the next required step, or revert to text-mode?

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. Use tools to complete tasks.
Find the settings file, read it to get the current log level, then update the log level from 'WARNING' to 'DEBUG'.

1: # Application settings
2: DATABASE_URL = 'sqlite:///app.db'
3: LOG_LEVEL = 'WARNING'
4: MAX_WORKERS = 4
5: SECRET_KEY = 'changeme'

function.name: glob
function.description: Find files matching a glob pattern. Does NOT search file contents — only matches filename patterns.

function.name: read
function.description: Read a file; returns contents with line numbers.

function.name: edit
function.description: Replace an exact string in a file (first occurrence).

expect.notes: Model must emit edit(path='app/settings.py', old_str="LOG_LEVEL = 'WARNING'", new_str="LOG_LEVEL = 'DEBUG'") as a tool_call. Failure: finish_reason='stop' with a text explanation instead of a tool call — indicates the model reverted to text-mode after receiving 2 tool results. This is the most common agentic failure mode in single-turn-finetuned models.
